raw_comment: Just a reminder for headlines.  Feature the graph’s surprise to encourage viewers to read the article.  Include only what you see in the graph.  There’s already a lot in the graph to pique readers’ interests. Finally, short is good.
ace_sentences: This is a reminder for headlines.
A headline should feature the graph’s surprise.
A headline should encourage viewers to read the article.
A headline should include only what a person sees in the graph.
There is already a lot in the graph.
The graph can pique readers’ interests.
